positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a forest scene viewed from above (flat lay perspective). The foreground features abstract silhouettes of whimsical woodland animals (deer, fox, owl) playing among simplified natural elements like large leaves, stylized mushrooms, and delicate winding vines. The color palette should be restricted to deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with crisp white and cream accents for maximum visual pop. Use a clean, vector-graphic aesthetic with strong, bold outlines and geometric shapes to define the forms. The overall composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, ensuring all elements are scalable and print-ready for high-contrast apparel printing. Sunlight casting sharp, graphic shadows.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, photorealistic, 3d, low detail, muted color, gradient, messy lines
